title: Spatial transcriptomics study of Castleman disease.
author: Chen Y Zhang Z Li L Zhang M Li Z
content:
S-EPMC12009523 PMC12009523 Spatial transcriptomics study of Castleman disease.

Background

Castleman Disease (CD) is a rare lymphoproliferative disorder of uncertain etiology, primarily characterized by painless lymphadenopathy. To further understand the possible pathogenesis of the disease
